text.title: Trade-off Stakeholder Communication Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by reversibility, stakeholder count, and risk severity to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: emit engineer_note only; full bundle is noise for reversible decisions
emit engineer_note only; missing stakeholders fail role-fit
block ADR insert; loop to step 2 and rewrite divergent artefacts
publish bundle + insert into ADR Consequences
publish bundle after exec ≤120-word check; convergence-check optional

text.example: reversibility=type-1 → stakeholder_count=4 → risk_severity=high → convergence_check_passed=true → conclusion risk-preservation → publish bundle + ADR insert.
